# Add or improve Code of Conduct

The project should include a clear, contributor-friendly Code of Conduct that explains expected behavior, reporting channels, and enforcement.

Why: helps create a welcoming community and is required for many programs (e.g. Google Summer of Code, SSOC).

Acceptance criteria:
- Add `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` or improve the existing one to reference a contact (email or issue template)
- Link to the Code of Conduct from `README.md`

Labels: SSOC, docs, good first issue
